task_criteria: connect-go handlers mounted on chi router at /bunker.v1.Bunkerd/ and /bunker.v1.Agent/
BunkerdHandler and AgentHandler implement all RPC methods defined in bunker.proto
Server supports gRPC, Connect, and gRPC-Web protocols with binary Protobuf and JSON codecs
gzip compression enabled by default on connect-go handlers
Health check endpoint /healthz returns JSON status
Optional separate RESTAddr listener when RESTAddr != GRPCAddr
TLS support via certmagic (auto Let's Encrypt) or file-based certs on both listeners
Auth interceptor applied to both Bunkerd and Agent handlers
Build passes: go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...
